name: Ganon
description:
("Link to the Past" version)

Ganon is the main antagonist of the Zelda series. This variation of Ganon is the result of the Gerudo king successfully achieving his goal of reclaiming the three Triforce pieces during the 7 year-long rule he held over Hyrule but was sealed away as a last ditch effort by the sages which later led to the Imprisoning War. He now remains sealed in the sacred realm of the Triforce which he twisted into his dark designs, now called the Dark World.

He no longer has his dark-skinned human like appearance, now stuck in the form of a bulky, blue humanoid boar clad in armor wielding a trident. His current form being the result of using the full might of the Triforce prior during his first clash with the hero, assuming his beastly form and no longer humanoid.

He still kept his sentience and great mind but is nigh invincible while possessing the full Triforce. His level of magic knows almost no bounds as he can conjure dark beasts, create an alter ego disguise and more. This version possesses the entire Triforce enhancing his magic tenfold which was able to spread his dark influence from his current realm to the light world. He is still adept at close quarters combat using his magical trident.
creator: AnimeMan1993
